subject: fix: remove dead cellAlignments/cellOverlays from cleanupOrphanedCells, memo ThemeColorPicker
body:
cleanupOrphanedCells computed cellAlignments and cellOverlays from
prev.layout but no caller used them — both setLayout and applyLayoutPreset
handle layout-internal fields separately from the NEW layout. Removed
the dead code and added a comment explaining why.

Wrapped ThemeColorPicker in memo() to prevent unnecessary re-renders
when parent re-renders but picker props haven't changed.

Tags: cleanup, perf
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-refactor
Semver: patch
